description_long: This is a sporty, low-cut athletic shoe featuring a vibrant red mesh upper with gray synthetic overlays and black accent stripes on the side. The shoe has a white, textured rubber sole with visible signs of dirt and wear, suggesting outdoor use. There are lime green highlights on the heel pull tab and near the lacing system, adding a pop of color. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with gray laces, and the tongue displays a green label with text. The interior lining is red, and the heel counter is reinforced with a black synthetic material for added support. The overall design is lightweight and breathable, suitable for running or casual urban activities.
description: A red athletic shoe with gray overlays, black stripes, and lime green accents, featuring a white worn sole and standard lacing. The design is sporty, lightweight, and shows signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red mesh upper, gray overlays, three black stripes, and the white sole with visible dirt.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the lime green heel pull tab, black heel counter, and the worn white sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the red mesh, gray overlays, and the absence of black stripes on this side.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded toe, gray laces in a criss-cross pattern, and the green label on the tongue.
attribute_logo: Three black parallel stripes on the side panel, typical of Adidas branding.
